title: justicia candicans
intro: Justicia candicans, also known as the 'Queen's Wreath', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Justicia candicans, including teas and infusions, have been used to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
